report_name: Hola Browser Compromised in Supply Chain Attack Delivering Cryptominer

attack_patterns.name: Compromise Software Supply Chain
attack_patterns.description: Attackers compromised the software distribution pipeline for Hola Browser, injecting a malicious cryptominer into the installation package for version 1.251.91.0.

attack_patterns.name: Resource Hijacking
attack_patterns.description: A Monero (XMR) cryptominer was installed on user systems to consume CPU cycles and electricity for the attacker's financial gain, a practice known as cryptojacking.

attack_patterns.name: Windows Service
attack_patterns.description: The malware established persistence by creating an auto-starting Windows service named 'hola_monitor_svc'.

attack_patterns.name: Disable or Modify Tools
attack_patterns.description: The malware added an exclusion for its executable (HolaMonitorService.exe) in Windows Defender to evade detection.

malware.name: XMRig Cryptominer
malware.description: A Monero (XMR) cryptominer based on XMRig, distributed via a supply chain attack on Hola Browser. The initial unsigned dropper was named 'me.exe' and it persisted by copying itself to 'HolaMonitorService.exe' and creating a Windows service.

tools.name: Hola Browser
tools.description: The Windows version of the Hola Browser (version 1.251.91.0) was compromised and used as the delivery vehicle for a cryptominer in a supply chain attack.

identities.name: Hola
identities.description: The software vendor whose Windows browser application, Hola Browser, was compromised in a supply chain attack to distribute a cryptominer.

infrastructure.name: Monero Mining Pool Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: The cryptominer malware connected to Monero (XMR) mining pools to receive work and submit results. Specific pool addresses were not disclosed in the article.

indicators.name: Hola Browser Cryptominer File Artifacts
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: Hola Browser Cryptominer File Artifacts
id: 2f7b1d9c-1a8e-4f5c-8d3a-9c4b2e1a0f8d
status: experimental
description: Detects the presence of malicious files associated with the Hola Browser supply chain attack.
references:
  - https://cyberinsider.com/hola-browser-supply-chain-breach-delivered-crypto-miner-to-users/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-09
tags:
  - attack.t1195.002
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\me.exe'
      - '\HolaMonitorService.exe'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects malicious file names associated with the Hola Browser cryptominer payload.

indicators.name: Hola Browser Cryptominer Persistence Registry Key
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: Hola Browser Cryptominer Persistence Registry Key
id: 8c3a2b1d-9e4f-4a7b-8d3a-9c4b2e1a0f8d
status: experimental
description: Detects the creation of the persistence registry key for the Hola Browser cryptominer service.
references:
  - https://cyberinsider.com/hola-browser-supply-chain-breach-delivered-crypto-miner-to-users/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-09
tags:
  - attack.t1543.003
level: high
logsource:
  category: registry_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetObject|contains: '\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\hola_monitor_svc'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the registry key created by the malware for service-based persistence.

indicators.name: Hola Browser Cryptominer Service Creation
indicators.pattern:
title: Hola Browser Cryptominer Service Creation
id: 5a9b8c7d-3e2f-4a1b-9c8d-7e6f5d4c3b2a
status: experimental
description: Detects the creation of the malicious 'hola_monitor_svc' Windows service used for persistence by the cryptominer.
references:
  - https://cyberinsider.com/hola-browser-supply-chain-breach-delivered-crypto-miner-to-users/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-09
tags:
  - attack.t1543.003
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\sc.exe'
      - '\powershell.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'create'
      - 'hola_monitor_svc'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the creation of the 'hola_monitor_svc' Windows service used for persistence.

indicators.name: Hola Browser Cryptominer Windows Defender Exclusion
indicators.pattern:
title: Hola Browser Cryptominer Windows Defender Exclusion
id: 1d2e3f4a-5b6c-4d7e-8f9a-0b1c2d3e4f5a
status: experimental
description: Detects the command used by the Hola Browser cryptominer to add an exclusion for itself in Windows Defender.
references:
  - https://cyberinsider.com/hola-browser-supply-chain-breach-delivered-crypto-miner-to-users/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-09
tags:
  - attack.t1562.001
level: medium
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\powershell.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'Add-MpPreference'
      - '-ExclusionPath'
      - 'HolaMonitorService.exe'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the PowerShell command used to add a Windows Defender exclusion for the malware.

relationships.source_name: Hola Browser Cryptominer Persistence Registry Key
Hola Browser Cryptominer Persistence Registry Key
Hola Browser Cryptominer Windows Defender Exclusion
